name: StepFun
description: Registers StepFun as a first-party OpenAI-compatible chat provider with upstream model discovery.

env.description: Fallback StepFun API key used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Official StepFun API key environment variable used for model discovery and inference when no api_key Plugin Setting or STEPFUN_API_KEY is configured.

settings.label: StepFun API key
settings.description: StepFun API key used for model discovery and inference. Falls back to STEPFUN_API_KEY or STEP_API_KEY.

providers.name: StepFun
providers.description: Refreshes StepFun OpenAI-compatible chat models from the upstream /v1/models catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
